## Runtime.IRuntimeBarTruffle interface

Runtime confection narrowed to bar truffle type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IRuntimeBarTruffle extends IRuntimeConfection 
```
**Extends:** [IRuntimeConfection](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimeconfection.md)
